news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a new single stock Leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting opportunity to amplify exposure to Broadcom (AVGO)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long AVGO Daily ETF (AVGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) stock, less fees, and expenses. AVGG was launched on May 16, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a new single stock Leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting opportunity to amplify exposure to Broadcom (AVGO)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., May 16, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes, an issuer of innovative exchange-traded products, is excited to announce the launch of a new single stock leveraged ETF, a...
